productDisplayName: Facit Men Grey Printed Innerwear Vest
description: In a sporty shape and with a masculine cut, this vest from facit makes a perfect addition to your home wear wardrobe. The stretchable and absorbent soft cotton fabric makes it a great comfy buy. Wear it just like that or layer it under any outfit for unparalleled comfort.
